productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherette Black Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish, black bag from lino perros to your accessory collection. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Height: 34 cm Width: 42 cm Depth: 13 cm Made of synthetic leather for durability Has one main roomy, zipped compartment with two inner zipped compartments and an organiser pouch for essentials Two short handles woven through metallic loops and a long removable, adjustable strap for carrying ease and style A metallic twist lock with a braided design on the front for style A zipped pocket at the back and a slightly pleated design at the bottom of the bag Stitch detailing, branded zips and brand badge appliqué d on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
